prompt: Create a high-quality professional portrait photograph of a young Indian woman standing in a lush flowering garden at golden hour, framed vertically from mid-thigh upward. She wears a classic cream-colored saree with elegant gold borders and delicate pink-and-green floral embroidery scattered across the fabric, paired with a short-sleeved matching blouse. Her dark hair is parted and tied into a low elegant bun decorated with a thick garland of fresh white jasmine flowers on one side. Add traditional gold jewelry: one necklace, one pair of ornate dangling earrings, and multiple slim bangles on both wrists. Her hands rest gently together at her waist in a graceful pose. Place a plain medium-brown rectangular privacy block over the entire face area, centered vertically from forehead to chin, with no facial features visible. The background should be a richly blurred garden path with abundant green foliage and colorful flowers in pink, orange, yellow, and purple, with warm sunset bokeh glowing behind her. Use soft natural light, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture, refined editorial photography, warm romantic color grading, no text, no watermark.
